title: Resolution Indicating That the Shoreland Area Remains with the State Through the Laguna Lake Development Authority (LLDA) and the Improvements Thereon Shall Be Owned by the Municipal Government of Los Baños. in Such Case That the Area Has Served Its Purpose or Will Be Needed by Llda / National Government or Any Instrumentality for a Project with Greater Impact / Benefit or Any Violations Founds Thereof, the Ownership of the Structure / Facility Shall Revert to Llda Except Those Within Titled Pro
